payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – February 2026
payload.publisher: MTA New York City Transit / MTA Bus Company / MTA Staten Island Railway
payload.description: Financial and ridership report for MTA New York City Transit, MTA Bus Company, and MTA Staten Island Railway for February 2026, including budget performance, revenues, expenses, ridership, and staffing data.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Financial and ridership reporting entity for NYC subway and bus operations
Financial and ridership reporting entity for MTA Bus Company operations
Financial and ridership reporting entity for Staten Island Railway operations

payload.raw_value_text: Farebox revenue was lower by $16.3 million (2.8%)
The year-to-date February Farebox Operating Ratio was 32.4%
The year-to-date February Cost per Passenger was $7.37
The year-to-date February Revenue per Passenger was $2.39 per passenger

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Total Paid Ridership
MTA Bus End of February Headcount
MTA Bus YTD Farebox Operating Ratio

payload.raw_value_text: The February year-to-date Farebox Operating Ratio was 17.5%

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Cost per Passenger

payload.raw_value_text: The February year-to-date Cost per Passenger was $13.16

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Revenue per Passenger

payload.raw_value_text: The February year-to-date Revenue per Passenger was $2.30
The year-to-date February Farebox Operating Ratio was 5.0%
The year-to-date February Cost per Passenger was $42.27
The year-to-date February Revenue per Passenger was $2.11

payload.claim_text: NYCT overtime was $57.7 million (65.9%) unfavorable YTD mainly due to higher than projected absentee coverage needs, vacancies, and severe weather conditions
payload.subject: NYCT overtime

payload.claim_text: NYCT farebox revenue was $16.3 million (2.8%) unfavorable YTD primarily due to lower Subway and Bus paid ridership
payload.subject: NYCT farebox revenue

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Farebox Revenue Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: MTA Bus Company farebox revenue was $5.055 million (16.0%) unfavorable YTD primarily due to lower ridership
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company farebox revenue

payload.claim_text: SIR farebox revenue was $0.081 million (13.1%) unfavorable YTD due to lower than anticipated ridership
payload.subject: SIR farebox revenue

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: NYCT YTD February 2026 Subway Farebox Revenue
NYCT YTD February 2026 Bus Farebox Revenue

payload.raw_value_text: SIR year-to-date February 2026 farebox revenue totaled $0.537 million

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD February 2026 Farebox Revenue

payload.raw_value_text: The largest vacancies were in Subways/Bus Maintenance (1,440 positions)
